title: Collusion
content:
A surtax on the ecosystem;
    so many raindrops, mists
    and bud breakings
    record spring days,
    that the movement of sap
    fluids and other vital
    juices involves all life on a colossal
    scale; beyond puny human understanding
    why green shoots shed restrictions
    at the parochial level.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Collusion"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
